card.title: About Sri Venkataramana hotel
card.description:
Best-Selling Dishes at Sri Venkataramana hotel

Sri Venkataramana hotel is a popular food destination in Thayagaraju Nagar, Nellore, known for serving delicious indian food. Customers can order from Sri Venkataramana hotel for fresh preparation, satisfying portions, and flavorful dishes.

Gobi Noodles

Gobi Noodles is one of the popular dishes at Sri Venkataramana hotel. It is prepared with quality ingredients and offers a satisfying taste for customers ordering from Thayagaraju Nagar.

Veg Noodles

Veg Noodles is another preferred item from the menu. It is a good choice for customers looking to enjoy tasty indian food in Nellore.

Why Customers Love Ordering from Sri Venkataramana hotel

Customers prefer Sri Venkataramana hotel for its tasty food, reliable service, quick preparation, and menu choices. The restaurant serves indian dishes along with options such as other dry starters, making it suitable for different food preferences.

Enjoy Food from Sri Venkataramana hotel at Home with Swiggy

Swiggy makes it easy to order food from Sri Venkataramana hotel in Nellore. Customers can browse the menu, choose their favorite dishes, place an order online, make secure payments, track the order live, and enjoy doorstep delivery from Sri Venkataramana hotel in Thayagaraju Nagar.

Discover More Restaurants in Thayagaraju Nagar

Thayagaraju Nagar has many restaurants offering different cuisines, snacks, meals, desserts, and beverages. Customers exploring food delivery in Nellore can discover more restaurants and order their favorite food online through Swiggy.
